svg.title: AI-Powered Smart Grid Energy Intelligence Assistant — System Architecture
svg.desc: System architecture diagram showing data flow from CSV data sources through ETL pipeline, embedding and storage, hybrid retrieval, guardrails, multi-agent pipeline, evaluation layer, FastAPI backend, and React frontend.
svg.text: AI-Powered Smart Grid Energy Intelligence Assistant — System Architecture
Each agent passes context to the next; Escalation fires only when Health Score < 50
